MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Hooshmand, Esq. for Plaintiffs; Joshua Kastan, Esq. for defendant.
This matter came on calendar this day for notice motions hearings. Matter is heard with case #541310.
The Court, court personal and counsels are present in open court.
The case is called and counsel state their respective appearances.
The Court provides copy of the tentative rulings to counsel for review, and hears further oral argument from counsels.
After hearing the oral arguments and considering the moving documents, the Court adopted the tentative rulings as discussed. Mr. Hooshmand to prepares the orders and submit to Dept. 306 for signing.
